title: Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM (55 cm)
short_description: Minimal, classy, and made to stand out. The Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain is crafted from premium stainless steel with a polished silver finish that delivers a clean everyday look without the worry of tarnishing.
body_html:
The Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM is designed for those who like their style subtle yet noticeable. Featuring a sleek flat Miami curb pattern with a refined 3MM profile, this 55 cm chain adds the perfect touch of shine to any outfit.

Made from high-quality stainless steel, it is built for everyday wear and offers a comfortable, lightweight feel. Whether worn alone for a clean look or layered with other chains, the Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain effortlessly complements both casual and formal outfits. Its polished silver finish gives it a premium appearance while remaining low-maintenance and durable for daily use.

  • Premium Stainless Steel — strong, skin-friendly and built to last
  • Anti-Tarnish Finish — keeps its silver shine day after day
  • Sweat & Water Resistant — wear it to the gym, in the rain or in the shower
  • Everyday Wear Ready — lightweight, comfortable and fuss-free

Why you'll love it

  • Clean and versatile silver finish
  • Sleek 3MM flat Miami curb design
  • Comfortable for all-day wear
  • Lightweight yet durable construction
  • Pairs beautifully with watches, bracelets and layered chains
  • Suitable for both men and women

Style guide — dress it down with a t-shirt and jeans, keep it street with an oversized tee and cargos, sharpen it up under a shirt and trousers, or stack it with other Studd Muffyn chains for a layered look.

What's included: 1 × Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM (55 cm), ready for daily wear.
seo_title: Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM 55cm | Studd Muffyn
seo_description: Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM (55 cm) in premium stainless steel with a polished silver, anti-tarnish, water-resistant finish. Everyday ready.

metafields.highlights: Premium stainless steel · Polished silver finish · Flat Miami curb, 3MM · Anti-tarnish · Sweat & water resistant · Lightweight everyday wear · 55 cm length · Unisex
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Premium stainless steel with a polished silver-tone finish. Skin-friendly, anti-tarnish coating. Chain type: flat Miami curb. Thickness: 3MM. Length: 55 cm.
metafields.care_or_directions: Store in a dry place after use. Wipe gently with a soft cloth to maintain shine. Avoid direct contact with harsh chemicals and perfumes, and keep away from abrasive surfaces.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Will this chain tarnish or turn my skin green?
faqs.a: No. It is crafted from premium stainless steel with an anti-tarnish finish, so it keeps its polished silver shine and stays skin-friendly with everyday wear.

faqs.q: Can I wear it in the shower, gym or rain?
faqs.a: Yes. The chain is sweat and water resistant, so you can wear it while working out, in the rain or in the shower without damaging the finish.

faqs.q: How long is the chain and how thick is it?
faqs.a: It measures 55 cm in length with a slim, comfortable 3MM flat Miami curb profile — noticeable but never bulky.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for both men and women?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The clean silver finish and minimal flat curb design make it a versatile unisex piece for both men and women.

faqs.q: Can I layer it with other chains?
faqs.a: Yes. Its sleek 3MM profile makes it perfect for stacking — pair it with other Studd Muffyn chains, a watch or a bracelet for a layered look.
